title: Akayo Therapy
description:
Welcome to the office, where hard work meets beauty.

**Akayo Therapy** is a relaxing anime-style puzzle game set in a modern office environment. Complete puzzles and unlock stunning artwork featuring charming office girls, each with their own unique style and personality.

Enjoy a cozy atmosphere, relaxing music, and simple gameplay designed for casual players looking to unwind after a busy day.
 

Solve puzzles by placing pieces together and revealing full illustrations. Progress through levels, unlock new artwork, and expand your gallery as you discover more office-themed heroines.

Whether you're a puzzle enthusiast or simply looking for a relaxing experience, Akayo Therapy offers a casual and enjoyable journey through a colorful anime-inspired workplace.

🧩 **Classic Puzzle Gameplay**
Complete puzzles and reveal beautiful anime illustrations.

🏢 **Office-Themed Setting**
Meet charming office girls in a modern workplace environment.

🖼 **Unlockable Gallery**
Unlock new artwork as you progress through the game.

🎵 **Relaxing Atmosphere**
Enjoy calming music and stress-free gameplay.

✨ **Anime Art Style**
High-quality anime-inspired illustrations and colorful characters.

🌸 **Casual Experience**
Simple controls and accessible gameplay suitable for all players.
description_short: Relaxing anime-style puzzle game set in a modern office. Solve puzzles, unlock beautiful artwork featuring charming office girls, and enjoy a cozy atmosphere with calming music.
